purpose: Manual Power Apps Studio capture schema for missing/uncertain canvas control properties.

property_capture_template.Family: Modern | Classic | Special / host | App object | Components
property_capture_template.Property: Exact property name/casing from Studio or source
property_capture_template.Property group: Data | Design | Layout | Behavior | Accessibility | Advanced | Unknown
property_capture_template.Type: Text | Number | Boolean | Color | Formula | Table | Record | Enum | Media | Unknown
property_capture_template.Default value: As inserted in a blank app, if visible
property_capture_template.Modern/classic scope: Modern only | Classic only | Both | Host only
property_capture_template.Notes: Anything odd, renamed, preview, deprecated, generated, or only available under certain settings

controls.Currently known properties: Unknown from current Bible. Often appears only when embedding canvas apps in Power BI.
controls.Candidate/common properties to check: Data, Refresh, OnDataRefresh, selected/filtered integration context where available
controls.Studio capture task: Only test inside a Power BI embedded canvas app scenario. Capture available properties from formula bar and exported source.

controls.Currently known properties: Mentioned as a generated or special property needing verification.
controls.Candidate/common properties to check: SearchItems, SearchFields, IsSearchable, DelayOutput, Items, DefaultSelectedItems
controls.Studio capture task: Test Combo box/Search-capable controls. Change search settings and inspect YAML/source for generated properties.

controls.Currently known properties: Component property surface depends on maker-defined inputs/outputs/events.
controls.Candidate/common properties to check: Custom property name, data type, property kind, default formula, raise OnReset/behavior formulas
controls.Studio capture task: Create a custom component with input, output, behavior, table/record properties. Export source and capture schema shape.

controls.Gap status: Top-level app properties not fully captured
controls.Currently known properties: StartScreen, OnStart, OnError, ConfirmExit, ConfirmExitMessage are likely but not fully validated here.
controls.Candidate/common properties to check: OnStart, StartScreen, OnError, ConfirmExit, ConfirmExitMessage, Theme, SizeBreakpoints, LoadingSpinner, BackEnabled
controls.Studio capture task: Open App object in tree view, record all properties. Export/unpack and compare app-level YAML/properties.

controls.Currently known properties: None beyond existence/source page. Capture everything shown in Studio and code view.
controls.Candidate/common properties to check: X; Y; Width; Height; Visible; DisplayMode; TabIndex; Tooltip; AccessibleLabel; BorderColor; BorderStyle; BorderThickness; FocusedBorderColor; FocusedBorderThickness; Color; Fill; DisabledColor; DisabledFill; HoverColor; HoverFill; PressedColor; PressedFill; Font; FontWeight; FontStyle; FontSize; Align; VerticalAlign; PaddingLeft; PaddingRight; PaddingTop; PaddingBottom; OnSelect; OnChange; Reset; Default; Value; Text; Items; Selected; SelectedItems
controls.Studio capture task: Create one instance of the control, open Advanced properties, record every property visible. Also save/export/unpack the app and capture any additional YAML/properties not shown in the pane.

controls.Currently known properties: None beyond existence/source page. Capture everything shown in Studio and code view.
